title: Did The Egyptians Use LEVITATION To Build The Pyramids?
summary: This interview segment discusses the possibility that ancient Egyptians used levitation or sound-based technology to construct the pyramids, particularly for moving massive stone blocks to great heights. The discussion explores ancient traditions describing priests using chanting and music to lift heavy stones.

key_claims.claim: Ancient Egyptians moved 200 ton blocks of stone 350 feet in the air to build chambers in the heart of the Great Pyramid
Ancient Egyptian traditions speak of priests levitating large blocks accompanied by sound, chanting, and music
If humans had not become dependent on mechanical advantage and leverage, construction methods might have developed differently
